Help & Support

Answers to common questions, a quick start guide, and ways to reach the team when you need a hand.

Frequently Asked Questions

Contact Support

Have a question? Email our team and we'll be happy to help.

Report a Bug

Spotted something off? Let us know what happened so we can fix it.

Request a Feature

Share an idea — your feedback shapes where Loan Khatam goes next.

User Guide

  1. 1Set up your Financial Profile so planners can auto-fill your income, expenses and surplus.
  2. 2Add your loans manually, or import them from a statement on the dashboard.
  3. 3Open any loan to view its full amortization schedule and current balance.
  4. 4Use the Smart Strategy planner to compare payoff approaches and prepayment scenarios.
  5. 5Review the interest savings and closure timeline, then adjust the numbers to explore options.
  6. 6Record payments to keep your dashboard and progress up to date.
